articles.title: CorSport on Lazio-Milan: "Max bows to the commander"
articles.summary: Milan lose 1-0 at Lazio and are now -8 from first place. Today's edition of Corriere dello Sport offers a broad focus on yesterday's match, with the headline: "Max bows to the commander".

articles.title: CorSera: "Milan lost against Lazio, now Inter are at plus eight"
articles.summary: Very bitter Sunday for Milan. The Rossoneri lost narrowly at the Stadio Olimpico against Lazio and saw their chance of getting closer to Inter disappear, now with an 8-point advantage in the standings.

articles.title: Tuttosport: "Isaksen also scores for Inter. Milan flop against Lazio, -8"
articles.summary: Nothing to be done, the move to move closer in the standings doesn't work for Milan: the Rossoneri lose 1-0 at Lazio, don't take advantage of Inter's home draw against Atalanta and are now -8 from first place.

articles.title: Bitter Sunday for Milan. CorSport: "Sarri, a gift to Inter"
articles.summary: Milan does not take advantage of the opportunity and loses ground once again in first place in the standings.

articles.title: La Gazzetta on the front page: "Milan falls to -8"
articles.summary: Very bitter Sunday for Milan. The Rossoneri did not take advantage of Inter's misstep, they fell at the Olimpico against Lazio and missed the opportunity to get closer to first place in the standings.
